source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
sin'-zi-gus (sunzuge): In Php 4:3 it is rendered "yokefellow." WHm (Sunzuge), Thayer, Lex. New Testament, 594 (Suzuge), and others, take it as a proper name in this passage.view of his promised visit to Philippi.

See YOKE-FELLOW.
